nasb.text: When He had said this, He spat on the ground, and made clay of the spittle, and applied the clay to his eyes,

esv.text: Having said these things, he spit on the ground and made mud with the saliva. Then he anointed the man’s eyes with the mud

cnv.text: 說了這話，就吐唾沫在地上，用唾沫和了一點泥，把泥抹在瞎子的眼睛上，

ccb.text: 耶稣讲完后，便吐唾沫在地上，用唾沫和泥抹在那盲人的眼睛上，

csbs.text: 耶稣说了这些话，就吐唾沫在地上，用唾沫和了一点泥，抹在瞎眼之人的眼睛上，
